qas.q: Spillage: how should uou respond if you receive an inquiry for info not clear for public release?
qas.a: Refer your order to PAO.

qas.q: Spillage: what will help prevent spillage?
qas.a: Follow procedures for transfering data to and from outside agency and networks.

qas.q: Classified data: what is the basis for handling classified data?
qas.a: Classification level and handling caveats

qas.q: Classified data: who designates classified data?
qas.a: Original Classification Authority

qas.q: Insider Threat: which is the following of a potential insider threat?
qas.a: Difficult life circumstances

qas.q: Insider threat: what function do insider threat programs aim to fulfill?
qas.a: Proactively identify future threats and formulate wholistic mitigation responses

qas.q: Insider threats: what is a reportable insider threat?
qas.a: A colleague removes sensitive info w/o seeking authorization in order to perform authorized telework

qas.q: Social Networking: when might you be subject to criminal, disciplinary, or administrative action due to online harassment, bullying, stalking, etc?
qas.a: If you participate/condone it in anyway

qas.q: Social Networking: which of the following is a security best practice when using social networking sites?
qas.a: Avoid posting pii (mothers maiden name)

qas.q: Social Networking: Protect yourself on social networking sites?
qas.a: Delete posts containing Personal information on a regular basis

qas.q: Controlled Unclass Info: which Desi marks information that does not have the potential to damage national security
qas.a: Unclassified

qas.q: Controlled Unclass Info: What's true for CUI?
qas.a: CUI must have diseminating controls

qas.q: Controlled Unclass Info: best way to transmit CUI?
qas.a: Make sure recipients are clear and need to know then send via encrypted email

qas.q: Physical security: which CPCON establishes a protection policy focus critical functions only
qas.a: CPCON 1

qas.q: Identity Management: strong password?
qas.a: @rF+13gtK5!

qas.q: Identify Management: whats true about CACs?
qas.a: It contains certificates for ID, encryption, and digital signature

qas.q: SCI: what's true of sharing info in a SCIF?
qas.a: Avoid referencing derivitavely classified reports classified higher than the recipient

qas.q: SCI: what's true for transmitting SCI?
qas.a: Only transmit SCI if you're courier briefed for SCI

qas.q: Removable media in SCIF: what's true of PEDs in a SCIF?
qas.a: Only connect government-owned PEDs to the same level classification information system when authorized

qas.q: Malicious Code: what's true for downloading apps?
qas.a: For government devices, use approved and authorized apps only

qas.q: Website use: how should you respond to theft of identity?
qas.a: Contact reporting agencies, financial institutions, monitor credit card statements and report crime to law enforcement

qas.q: Social engineering: how to protect from social engineering?
qas.a: Verify identity of individuals

qas.q: Social engineering: common indicator of phishng attempt?
qas.a: Claim that you update or validate information

qas.q: Social engineering: what security issue is associated with compressed URLs?
qas.a: Can be used to mask malicious intent

qas.q: Travel: problems w/ public wifi?
qas.a: May expose information sent to theft

qas.q: GFE: what is personally owned monitor you shouldn't connect to your GFE?
qas.a: USB

qas.q: Mobile Devices: which is a best practice for using removable media?
qas.a: Avoid inserting removable media with unknown content into your computer

qas.q: Mobile devices: how can you protect data on your mobile computing and portable e-devices (PEDs)?
qas.a: Auto screen locking

qas.q: Home Computer: best practice for securing home computer?
qas.a: Install system security patches
